node_kinds.name: OP_Account
node_kinds.description: A 1Password Business account, the top-level organizational resource

node_kinds.name: OP_User
node_kinds.description: A user belonging to a 1Password Business account

node_kinds.name: OP_Group
node_kinds.description: A group of users within a 1Password Business account, used for permission assignment

node_kinds.name: OP_Vault
node_kinds.description: A vault that holds items such as logins, credentials, and documents

node_kinds.name: OP_Item
node_kinds.description: A generic vault item (fallback for unrecognized item categories)

node_kinds.name: OP_ApiCredential
node_kinds.description: An API key, token, or secret used by applications or services to authenticate against an API

node_kinds.name: OP_CreditCard
node_kinds.description: A stored payment card record, including card number, expiration date, and billing details

node_kinds.name: OP_Document
node_kinds.description: An arbitrary file or document (PDF, Word, spreadsheet, etc.) attached to a vault

node_kinds.name: OP_Login
node_kinds.description: A website or service login record containing a username and password pair

node_kinds.name: OP_Passport
node_kinds.description: A secure record formatted for passport information (number, issue/expiry dates, etc.)

node_kinds.name: OP_Password
node_kinds.description: A standalone password entry, not tied to a specific login record

node_kinds.name: OP_SecureNote
node_kinds.description: A free-form secure note for storing text, URLs, or other sensitive free-form data

node_kinds.name: OP_Server
node_kinds.description: Credentials for server access (SSH password, IP address, admin URL, etc.)

node_kinds.name: OP_SoftwareLicense
node_kinds.description: A software license key or file, optionally with purchase/expiry metadata

node_kinds.name: OP_SshKey
node_kinds.description: An SSH key pair (public + private) for authenticating to servers

node_kinds.name: OP_WirelessRouter
node_kinds.description: Wi-Fi network credentials (SSID, passphrase, encryption type)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_Contains
relationship_kinds.description: Account contains a child resource (user, group, vault, or item)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_HasItem
relationship_kinds.description: Vault holds an item

relationship_kinds.name: OP_MemberOf
relationship_kinds.description: User is a member of a group, inheriting the group's vault permissions

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ManagerOf
relationship_kinds.description: User is a manager of a group and can add/remove members and change vault assignments

relationship_kinds.name: OP_AddMember
relationship_kinds.description: Group can add members to another group (post-processed from OP_ManageGroups permission on USER_DEFINED groups)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_CanAddMember
relationship_kinds.description: User (as group manager) can add members to a group

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ViewItems
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can view items in the vault (cryptographically enforced — grants the vault encryption key)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_CreateItems
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can create new items in the vault (server-enforced)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_EditItems
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can edit existing items in the vault (server-enforced)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ArchiveItems
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can archive items in the vault (server-enforced)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_DeleteItems
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can delete items from the vault (server-enforced)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ManageVault
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can manage vault settings, grant/revoke access for others, and delete the vault (server-enforced). Can self-grant view_items to escalate to full vault access.

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ViewAndCopyPasswords
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can view and copy passwords from vault items (client-enforced only — unenforceable if principal has view_items)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ViewItemHistory
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can view the history of items in the vault (client-enforced)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ImportItems
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can import items into the vault (server-enforced)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ExportItems
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can export vault data to unencrypted files (client-enforced only — exfiltration vector)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_CopyAndShareItems
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can copy items to other vaults and share items via links (client-enforced only)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_PrintItems
relationship_kinds.description: Principal can print items from the vault (client-enforced)

relationship_kinds.name: OP_AddPerson
relationship_kinds.description: Group can invite new members to the 1Password account

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ChangePersonName
relationship_kinds.description: Group can change a team member's name

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ChangeTeamAttributes
relationship_kinds.description: Group can change team attributes

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ChangeTeamDomain
relationship_kinds.description: Group can change the team's sign-in domain

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ChangeTeamSettings
relationship_kinds.description: Group can change team settings including authentication policies, SSO configuration, and firewall rules

relationship_kinds.name: OP_CreateVaults
relationship_kinds.description: Group can create new vaults in the account

relationship_kinds.name: OP_DeletePerson
relationship_kinds.description: Group can permanently delete team members from the account

relationship_kinds.name: OP_DeleteTeam
relationship_kinds.description: Group can delete the entire 1Password team/account

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ManageBilling
relationship_kinds.description: Group can manage billing settings for the account

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ManageGroups
relationship_kinds.description: Group can manage all custom (USER_DEFINED) groups in the account — add/remove members, change vault assignments

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ManageTemplates
relationship_kinds.description: Group can manage item templates for the account

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ManageVaults
relationship_kinds.description: Group has account-level vault management — equivalent to manage_vault on every vault in the account

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ProvisionPeople
relationship_kinds.description: Group can provision team members via SCIM or CLI

relationship_kinds.name: OP_RecoverAccounts
relationship_kinds.description: Group can initiate account recovery for any user — an account takeover primitive when combined with email access

relationship_kinds.name: OP_SuspendPerson
relationship_kinds.description: Group can temporarily suspend a team member's account

relationship_kinds.name: OP_SuspendTeam
relationship_kinds.description: Group can suspend the entire team/account

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ViewActivitiesLog
relationship_kinds.description: Group can view the account's activity log

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ViewAdministrativeSidebar
relationship_kinds.description: Group can view the administrative sidebar in the 1Password web interface

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ViewBilling
relationship_kinds.description: Group can view billing information for the account

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ViewPeople
relationship_kinds.description: Group can view the list of team members

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ViewTeamSettings
relationship_kinds.description: Group can view team settings

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ViewTemplates
relationship_kinds.description: Group can view item templates

relationship_kinds.name: OP_ViewVaults
relationship_kinds.description: Group can view the list of vaults in the account
